title: FloristryWarehouse Hanging Artificial Sloe or Berry Spray Purple 55cm
features: A spray of lifelike deep purple sloe-type berries on a green and brown stem
The berries are in mixed stages of ripeness and vary in size and colour
Leaves are vary in shades of green
Ideal for Autumn-themed displays and decorations
description: A spray of lifelike deep purple sloe-type berries on a green and brown stem. The berries are in mixed stages of ripeness and vary in size and colour, and the leaves are vary in shades of green. The spray is approximately 55cm/21 inches long in total. Ideal for Autumn-themed displays and decorations. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings. All sizes are approximate.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Autumn-themed decoration, both indoor and outdoor
